document.title: FCC TEST REPORT for Product: POE injector
standards: FCC Part 15, Subpart B Class B

sourceSummary.oneLine: FCC test report for an SDAPO POE injector, identifying model PSE802G in test certification and showing conducted and radiated emissions passed FCC Part 15 Class B limits.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use as supporting EMC/FCC Part 15 Subpart B Class B test evidence for the tested POE injector sample; the report states the test results only relate to the tested sample.
keyPoints: Report No. JAT24041102618FR-2 was issued by Dongguan Jun'an Testing & Certification Co., Ltd.
Applicant and manufacturer are SDAPO Communication Co., Ltd.
Test certification identifies product POE injector, model PSE802G, trade name SDAPO.
Applicable standards are FCC Part 15, Subpart B Class B and ANSI C63.4:2014.
Conducted Emission and Radiated Emission results are PASS.

concepts.evidence: Radiated Emission PASS Complied with limit

concepts.evidence: If a product must be tested and authorized under Supplier’s Declaration of Conformity, a compliance information statement shall be supplied with product at the time of marketing or importation

concepts.evidence: According to FCC Part 15 Section 15.19, a device subject to certification or Supplier’s Declaration of Conformity shall be labelled as follows

evidence.claim: The report was issued on 2024-04-11.
evidence.pageTarget: POE Injector FCC Test Report JAT24041102618FR-2

evidence.claim: The test date range was 2024-04-01 to 2024-04-11.
evidence.pageTarget: POE Injector FCC Test Report JAT24041102618FR-2

evidence.claim: The test certification identifies model PSE802G.
The cover page lists models PSE30, PSE801, PSE30G, PSE801G, PSE30TG, PSE802G, PSE60G, PSE156G, PSE90G, and POE4805.
The applicant is SDAPO Communication Co., Ltd.
The manufacturer is SDAPO Communication Co., Ltd.
The trade name is SDAPO.
The applicable standards are FCC Part 15, Subpart B Class B and ANSI C63.4:2014.
evidence.evidenceText: Applicable Standards: FCC Part 15, Subpart B Class B ANSI C63.4:2014
evidence.pageTarget: FCC Part 15 Subpart B Class B

evidence.claim: The equipment was found compliant with the listed technical standards.
evidence.evidenceText: The above equipment has been tested by Dongguan Jun'an TESTING & CERTIFICATION CO., LTD. and found compliance with the requirements in the technical standards mentioned above.

evidence.claim: Conducted emission at the main port passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Conducted Emission (Main Port) PASS Complied with limit

evidence.claim: Radiated emission passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Radiated Emission PASS Complied with limit

evidence.claim: The EUT supplied voltage is 240VAC.
The conducted emission test mode was Working.
The radiated emission test mode was Working.
FCC Part 15 Section 15.19 labeling text is included for devices subject to certification or Supplier's Declaration of Conformity.
evidence.evidenceText: According to FCC Part 15 Section 15.19, a device subject to certification or Supplier’s Declaration of Conformity shall be labelled as follows

evidence.claim: Supplier's Declaration of Conformity compliance information must identify the product, include a compliance statement, and identify the responsible party.
evidence.evidenceText: containing the following information: (1) Identification of the product, e.g., name and model number; (2) A compliance statement as applicable... and (3) The identification, by name, address and telephone number or Internet contact information, of the responsible party.

evidence.claim: The responsible party for Supplier's Declaration of Conformity must be located within the United States.
evidence.evidenceText: The responsible party for Supplier’s Declaration of Conformity must be located within the United States.

evidence.claim: FCC Part 15 Section 15.21 requires a caution that unauthorized changes or modifications could void the user's authority to operate the equipment.
evidence.evidenceText: According to FCC Part 15 section 15.21, the users manual or instruction manual for an intentional or unintentional radiator shall caution the user that: “Changes or modifications not expressly approved by the party responsible for compliance could void the user's authority to operate the equipment”.

evidence.claim: FCC Part 15 Section 15.105 user instructions include the Class B digital device interference statement.
evidence.evidenceText: refer to FCC Part 15 section 15.105, the instructions furnished the user shall include the following or similar statement... “Note: This equipment has been tested and found to comply with the limits for a Class B digital device, pursuant to part 15 of the FCC Rules.

reviewFlags.reason: Revision or version metadata is not present; the report number is available but no revision section value is provided in the extracted text.
Model scope is ambiguous: the cover page lists multiple models, while the test certification, EUT description, and test result sections identify model PSE802G.
Authority signal metadata is general, but the document text identifies FCC-related requirements and standards.
